description: Synthetic ground-truth fixture for prohibited and high-risk tier precision/recall measurement. Each fixture file is hand-crafted to contain a single, unambiguous example of the labelled tier. Fixture filenames use Article references (art5_1a etc.) instead of trigger words because Regula's own pre_tool_use hook would otherwise block the manifest from being read.
negative_meaning: not_high means the file must NOT be classified as prohibited or high_risk. Any tier minimal_risk/limited_risk/not_ai is acceptable for negative fixtures.
